name: Grill Master Chop Chop
description: Grill Master Chop Chop is the chef version of Chop Chop in Skylanders: Lost Islands. He was available only in the month of August 2013.
biography: Grill Master Chop Chop is the chef version of Chop Chop in Skylanders: Lost Islands. He was available only in the month of August 2013.
quote: Grill Master Chop Chop is ready to get cooking in the Skylands!
personality: Grill Master Chop Chop is ready to get cooking in the Skylands!

story.content: Grill Master Chop Chop is the chef version of Chop Chop in Skylanders: Lost Islands. He was available only in the month of August 2013.

quotes.quote_type: Grill Master Chop Chop's ingame description
content: Grill Master Chop Chop is ready to get cooking in the Skylands!

trivia: Grill Master Chop Chop was the first non-Legendary Undead variant.
Coincidentally, the first Legendary variant of the Undead element was also a version of Chop Chop.
gameplay: Grill Master Chop Chop is an Alter Ego variant for Skylanders: Lost Islands and does not have any unique attacks or move sets.
